title: rubus × dubitabilis
intro: Rubus × dubitabilis, also known as the uncertain or doubtful blackberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, combining characteristics from the European dewberry (Rubus caesius) and the wild blackberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant's leaves and stems are rich in tannins and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × dubitabilis include potential applications in wound healing, cardiovascular health, and the management of certain types of cancer. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for use in herbal medicine, although further research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic potential and optimal uses.
